name: test_delete_user[TC_USR_DEL_003-data2]
description:
DELETE /users/{id} — parametrized across 3 user IDs.
        Verifies 204 status and empty response body for each.

        Test cases: TC_USR_DEL_001 → TC_USR_DEL_003
descriptionHtml:
DELETE /users/{id} — parametrized across 3 user IDs.
    Verifies 204 status and empty response body for each.

    Test cases: TC_USR_DEL_001 → TC_USR_DEL_003
statusMessage:
AssertionError: [TC_USR_DEL_003] DELETE user 5 — expect 204 and empty body
    Expected 204, got 429
assert 429 == 204
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
statusTrace:

    assert response.status_code == data["expected_status"], (

E   assert 429 == 204
E    +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
